title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Engineered coding solutions for Arduino-based hardware systems, earning a Systems Tool Kit (STK) Certification.
Designed and implemented a real-time tracking model mapping the International Space Station's orbital location relative to Earth.

title: Software Development Fellow
bullets: Developed responsive, interactive web applications using modern JavaScript libraries through intensive weekly sprint projects.
Collaborated in an agile-style team environment to brainstorm, build, and deploy innovative tech solutions.
